title: Gratin-Fried Tofu
description: A crispy and savory tofu dish inspired by the French gratin method.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra-firm tofu, drained and cut into 1-inch cubes

ingredients.name: bitter
ingredients.notes: Chopped bitter melon or 1 tablespoon bitter greens powder

ingredients.name: gooey
ingredients.notes: Gooey cheese, shredded (such as mozzarella or cheddar)

instructions: 2. In a shallow dish, mix together the French breadcrumbs and bitter melon or greens powder.
3. Dip each tofu cube into the breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently to coat.
4. Place the coated tofu cubes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Drizzle the gooey cheese over the tofu cubes.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the breadcrumbs are golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
7. Remove from the oven and serve hot.
